final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: luxury commercial product photography
Primary request: macro close-up still life of a high-end tourbillon mechanical watch
Scene/backdrop: dark carbon fiber textured surface, shallow depth of field with blurred background
Subject: Swiss luxury tourbillon wristwatch, 42mm skeleton dial revealing intricate mechanical movement including balance wheel, hairspring, gear train and tourbillon mechanism, 18K rose gold case with diamond-set bezel, deep brown crocodile leather strap
Style/medium: professional jewelry photography, macro product shot
Composition/framing: top-down macro shot, sharp focus on tourbillon mechanism, shallow depth of field
Lighting/mood: professional jewelry lighting setup with multi-angle softboxes, even highlights on metal surfaces without overexposure, precise illumination to showcase mechanical details
Color palette: warm rose gold + deep brown leather + carbon fiber black + silver/steel mechanical components
Materials/textures: polished 18K rose gold with diamond reflections, genuine crocodile leather grain, carbon fiber weave, brushed and polished steel movement parts
Constraints: focus must be on tourbillon mechanism, accurate color reproduction for luxury commercial standards
Avoid: plastic appearance, uneven lighting, overexposed highlights, distracting background elements, cheap material look
